body.content:
With the recent major event of **April Fools**, the Factions Hub Events Team has decided to host a **morph competition** after the team being inactive for over a year. This year’s April Fools morph competition genre is *“April Fools”*, also known as *“the troll type”*.

Competition always comes with prices. As such, the reward for first place is **750 robux**  along with the **Events Winner** role. Subsequently, other podium spots will also receive prizes which are **500 Robux** for 2nd place and **250 Robux** for 3rd place.

After 72 hours, this event has officially ended. It has brought joy and encouraged people to use their creativity while also having fun!
